title: Cartography Schema 200
artist_persona: An artist working at the intersection of architecture and abstract geometry
description: A precision-crafted geometric study that echoes the Bohemian Eclectic-inspired architecture of the space. Intersecting planes in #ded2bf, #997a4d, and #c4ddeb create depth that draws the eye across the 200cm width. The refined contrast relates to the room's medium lighting, while the compositional rhythm mirrors the 0.61 proportion of vertical to horizontal lines in the room.
artwork_rationale: This piece responds to the room's Bohemian Eclectic architecture (high confidence) with its refined composition. The intimately scaled ceiling (3.4m) and bright crisp lighting conditions informed the scale and contrast. At 3.8m viewing distance, the large statement format fills the optimal field of view.
color_rationale: The palette draws from the room's dominant #ded2bf and accent #997a4d tones, ensuring mixed harmony with the existing neutral interior. The medium vibrancy level matches the room's subdued character.
image_prompt: A high-end digital artwork titled 'Cartography Schema 200', large statement format. A precision-crafted geometric study that echoes the Bohemian Eclectic-inspired architecture of the space. Intersecting planes in #ded2bf, #997a4d, and #c4ddeb create depth that draws the eye across the 200cm width. The refined contrast relates to the room's medium lighting, while the compositional rhythm mirrors the 0.61 proportion of vertical to horizontal lines in the room. The piece is museum-quality, suitable for a luxury interior. Color palette centered on #ded2bf with #997a4d accents. Style: structured elegant. The artwork should feel like a commissioned gallery piece — not generic, not templated, but intentionally made for this specific room with Bohemian Eclectic architecture.

recommended_frame.description: A slim black steel channel frame — nearly invisible — that lets the geometric composition speak directly to the wall. Mounted on a cleat system for perfect alignment.

recommended_lighting.description: An ultra-thin linear LED strip mounted behind the frame's top edge, casting a soft wash down the surface. 3500K for crisp geometric clarity.

recommended_placement: Secondary wall or above a console table, smaller scale as an accent counterpoint
